sql_array: CREATE TABLE sessions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data XML, status VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO sessions (id, data, status) VALUES (1, '<root><child>value</child></root>', 'active'), (2, '<root><child>value2</child></root>', 'inactive');
SELECT id, xpath_string('/root/child', data) AS child_value FROM sessions WHERE status = 'active';
SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE data IS NOT NULL AND ses_disconnect(id) IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY status) AS status_count FROM sessions WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE status = 'active' AND ses_disconnect(id) IS NULL) AND status IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_sessions (session_id INT, session_data XML, session_status VARCHAR(10) CHECK (session_status IN ('active', 'inactive')));
INSERT INTO temp_sessions (session_id, session_data, session_status) VALUES (3, '<root><child></child></root>', 'active'), (4, '<root><child>value4</child></root>', NULL);

SELECT ts.session_id, xpath_string('/root/child', ts.session_data) AS child_value FROM temp_sessions ts WHERE ts.session_status IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sessions s WHERE s.id = ts.session_id AND s.status = 'inactive');
SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) FROM temp_sessions GROUP BY session_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
